title: UPI meets NPI: How the new India-Nepal remittance facility benefits travellers, migrant workers
content:
A new remittance facility has been launched, integrating India's Unified Payments Interface (UPI) with Nepal's National Payments Interface (NPI).
*   This system enables easier and more efficient cross-border money transfers between India and Nepal.
*   The primary beneficiaries of this facility are travellers and migrant workers, simplifying their financial transactions.

title: Supreme Court stays adverse Allahbad High Court order against senior IAS officer
content:
The Supreme Court has issued a stay order.
*   This stay suspends an "adverse order" previously passed by the Allahabad High Court.
*   The original Allahabad High Court order was directed against a senior IAS officer.

title: BJP’s Rajya Sabha candidates in Madhya Pradesh elected unopposed; Election Commission yet to decide on Congress plea
content:
BJP's Rajya Sabha candidates in Madhya Pradesh have been elected unopposed.
*   The Congress party has filed a plea concerning these elections.
*   The Election Commission is yet to make a decision regarding this Congress plea.
